chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI IInd Appeal No. 24 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1.For hearing of CMA No.314/25 2.For hearing of main case 10.10.2025 None present ---------- For last four dates of hearing, none have been appearing for the appellant. Notices have been sent to counsel for appellant. No intimation is received. It appears that appellant has lost interest in this matter. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
